text.title: The Mom Test Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "hypothesis": "Inventory reconciliation costs SMB retailers >4h/week.", "persona": "SMB retailer (10-50 staff), uses Shopify + manual spreadsheet.", "questions": [ "Tell me about the last time you reconciled inventory.", "Walk me through your week-end close routine.", "How long did the last reconciliation take?", "What happens when the number is off?", "When did you last try to fix it?" ], "current_spend_question": "What are you spending today on tools, contractors, or staff time to keep inventory accurate?", "signal_classifier_output": { "compliment_count": 1, "fact_count": 9, "commitment_count": 2, "interviewer_word_share": 0.17 } }

example.note: Hypothetical/closed questions; missing persona, current_spend_question, signal_classifier_output.

list.item: Questions starting with 'Would you', 'Do you think', 'Will you'.
